en_title: 'I'd Take It in a Second' — Cyberpunk 2077 Player Resurgence Has Fans Calling on CD Projekt to Change Its Mind and Release More DLC
cn_title: 《赛博朋克2077》玩家回流，粉丝呼吁CD Projekt追加DLC
subtitle: 再来一份资料片
opus_summary: 《赛博朋克2077》近期Steam在线人数因折扣、《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》热度及联动活动突破10万。尽管CD Projekt称不会再推出DLC，粉丝仍希望其效仿《巫师3》改变决定。

paragraphs.en: Cyberpunk 2077 is having a moment, with impressive player numbers on Steam fueled by a recent sale, hype for upcoming Netflix anime Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 and its collaboration with Wuthering Waves. And while Cyberpunk 2077 is a known quantity at this point, and CD Projekt has told fans not to expect any more DLC, fans are calling on the developer to change its mind and release more DLC — just like The Witcher 3 is getting.
paragraphs.cn: 《赛博朋克2077》最近迎来高光时刻：促销活动、《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》即将上线的Netflix动画，以及与《鸣潮》的联动，共同推动Steam玩家人数上涨。尽管《赛博朋克2077》如今已是一款成熟作品，CD Projekt也告诉粉丝不要期待更多DLC，粉丝仍在呼吁开发商改变主意，像《巫师3》那样推出新的DLC。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this month, CD Projekt confirmed that Cyberpunk 2077 had sold an incredible 40 million copies since its December 2020 launch, up 5 million from November 2025. It's received one expansion so far, 2023's Phantom Liberty starring Idris Elba.
paragraphs.cn: 本月早些时候，CD Projekt确认《赛博朋克2077》自2020年12月发售以来已售出惊人的4,000万份，比2025年11月增加500万份。截至目前，游戏只推出过一部资料片，即由Idris Elba主演的2023年作品《往日之影》。

paragraphs.en: In May, CD Projekt insisted it had “no plans” for further Cyberpunk 2077 DLCs or expansions , disappointing fans who were still clamouring for more content despite the age of the game. It suggests fans will have to wait for Cyberpunk 2 to return to CD Projekt’s much-loved dystopian universe. And the wait looks like it's going to be significant; Cyberpunk 2 is further behind The Witcher 4, and CD Projekt co-CEO Michał Nowakowski has suggested Cyberpunk 2 won’t be out until at least 2030.
paragraphs.cn: 5月，CD Projekt坚称「没有计划」为《赛博朋克2077》制作更多DLC或扩展内容。这让尽管游戏已发售多年、仍渴望更多内容的粉丝失望。看来粉丝只能等《赛博朋克2》回到CD Projekt广受喜爱的反乌托邦宇宙中。但等待似乎会很漫长：《赛博朋克2》的开发进度落后于《巫师4》，CD Projekt联合首席执行官Michał Nowakowski暗示，《赛博朋克2》至少要到2030年才会推出。

paragraphs.en: On July 5, Cyberpunk 2077’s Steam peak concurrent player count surpassed 100,000, the highest it’s been since 2023. “Have fun my dears, hope it’s going to keep you hooked, entertained, and inspired,” Paweł Sasko, associate game director on Cyberpunk 2, tweeted in response .
paragraphs.cn: 7月5日，《赛博朋克2077》Steam同时在线人数峰值超过10万，创2023年以来新高。《赛博朋克2》副游戏总监Paweł Sasko在回应中发帖道：「好好享受吧，亲爱的，希望它能让你们保持投入、获得娱乐并受到启发。」

paragraphs.en: With this new player surge, fans are calling on CD Projekt to release new content. “Yeah, we are gonna need that second DLC CDPR!” reads the title of a reddit thread with 12,000 upvotes. “Honestly, they need some money so give us a dlc so we could give you more money!” one fan joked.
paragraphs.cn: 随着玩家人数回升，粉丝呼吁CD Projekt推出新内容。一篇获得12,000次赞的Reddit帖子标题写道：「是的，CDPR，我们需要第二部DLC！」一名粉丝开玩笑说：「说实话，他们需要钱，所以给我们一部DLC，我们就能给你们更多钱！」

paragraphs.en: “I would die if this game got another DLC (after I play it of course),” another added. “This is one of my favorite games of all time, it’s also one of the saddest cases of cut content from a game which is exactly why I want them to add more stuff. I’ve never spent as much time in any game looking around outside the map, and searching up cut content to see what this game was supposed to be. I don’t even know what the DLC would be about but damn it do I want another more than any other game right now.”
paragraphs.cn: 另一人补充道：「如果这款游戏再推出一部DLC，我会高兴到死（当然得先玩到它）。这是我有史以来最喜欢的游戏之一，也是游戏删减内容最令人遗憾的案例之一，所以我才希望他们继续添加内容。我从未在任何游戏里花这么多时间探索地图外的区域、搜索被删内容，看看这款游戏原本应该是什么样。我甚至不知道DLC会讲什么，但该死，我现在比任何游戏都更想要一部新的。」

paragraphs.en: “It’s a slap in the face The Witcher 3 is getting another DLC,” another, more serious fan, said. “To any Witcher fans reading I don’t hate the game for it but bro why is an 11-year old game with heaps of DLC still getting new shit and the newer title isn’t? I really wish they’d revisit some of the cut content and add it via DLC…”
paragraphs.cn: 另一名态度更认真的粉丝说：「《巫师3》还能获得新DLC，简直是在打我们的脸。看到这段话的《巫师》粉丝，我并不是因此讨厌那款游戏，但兄弟，为什么一款拥有大量DLC的11年前游戏还能获得新东西，而更新的作品却没有？我真希望他们能重新审视一些删减内容，通过DLC把它们加入游戏……」

paragraphs.en: “I’m just wrapping up my first playthrough. 100%ing it at around 220 hours. It’s incredible. A new DLC would wreck my plans to move onto my backlog, but I’d f***ing take it in a second lol,” another fan said.
paragraphs.cn: 另一名粉丝说：「我刚要结束第一轮流程，花了大约220小时才完成100%。这太不可思议了。新的DLC会打乱我清理游戏库存的计划，但我绝对会立刻接受，哈哈。」

paragraphs.en: Some suspect CD Projekt will indeed release new Cyberpunk 2077 DLC eventually, as it has done with The Witcher 3, but closer to the release of a new Cyberpunk game. For now, CD Projekt’s official line is no new Cyberpunk 2077 DLC is in the works. But there was no new The Witcher 3 DLC in the works for years before it was confirmed, so you never know.
paragraphs.cn: 有人猜测，CD Projekt最终确实会像对待《巫师3》那样推出新的《赛博朋克2077》DLC，但时间可能会接近下一部《赛博朋克》游戏发售。目前，CD Projekt的官方说法是没有制作新的《赛博朋克2077》DLC。不过，在官方确认前，《巫师3》新DLC也曾多年没有消息，所以谁也说不准。

paragraphs.en: If you’re just starting your adventure in Night City or returning to Cyberpunk 2077 after a long absence, use IGN’s complete walkthrough ( https://www.ign.com/wikis/cyberpunk-2077/Walkthrough_-_Main_Jobs ) to see all major choices possible for completing main jobs. Before you go too far, don’t forget to review the romance options in Cyberpunk and what you need to do to successfully woo them with our guide. ( https://www.ign.com/wikis/cyberpunk-2077/All_Romance_Options_and_Sexual_Encounters_Guide ) We also have a complete guide to Phantom Liberty ( https://www.ign.com/wikis/cyberpunk-2077/Cyberpunk_2077_Phantom_Liberty ), a console commands guide ( https://www.ign.com/wikis/cyberpunk-2077/Cyberpunk_2077_Console_Commands_and_Cheats_List ), and plenty more.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你刚开始在夜之城冒险，或久别后重返《赛博朋克2077》，可以使用IGN的完整流程攻略查看完成主线任务时的所有重大选择。别走太远之前，也别忘了通过我们的攻略了解《赛博朋克》的恋爱选项，以及成功追求他们所需的条件。我们还提供《往日之影》完整攻略、主机指令攻略等更多内容。
